englishDefinitions: Used to introduce or emphasize an unfortunate truth that is still true despite other information.
A shortened form of the phrase the sad fact remains.
persianTranslation: با این حال واقعیت غم‌انگیز پابرجاست
examples: The sad fact remains that many animals are abandoned after the holiday.
We tried to help, but the sad fact remains that we did not have enough money.
The sad fact remains: the old building cannot be repaired safely.
